title: ANC - Both modes disabled, turn on Transparency, default value selected
scenario: Transparency Mode defaults to Environment sub-setting when enabled after both ANC and Transparency are disabled
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Ensure ANC Mode is set to Off / Disabled.
Ensure Transparency Mode is set to Off / Disabled.
Observe the Transparency Mode sub-setting that is selected.
expected: When Transparency Mode is enabled, it defaults to the "Environment" sub-setting. ANC remains disabled.
